---
title: "Sample Endpoint"
openapi: "/api-reference/openapi.json POST /sample"
description: "A sample endpoint for testing."
---

## Overview

This is a sample endpoint used in tests.

## Request

<ParamField body="name" type="string" required>
  The name to process.
</ParamField>

<ParamField body="verbose" type="boolean">
  Enable verbose output. Defaults to `false`.
</ParamField>

## Response

<ResponseField name="id" type="string">
  Unique identifier for the created resource.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="status" type="string">
  Current status of the resource.
</ResponseField>
